title: Apparatus for releasably locking a stationary blade to a hair clipper
abstract: An apparatus 10 is provided for releasably locking a stationary blade to a hair clipper 12, and includes a stationary blade 18 with a blade opening 36, and a bracket 22 configured for fixing the stationary blade to the hair clipper. Also, the bracket has a bracket opening 38. An actuator 40 in the apparatus has a locking formation 42 engageable in the openings and is operable between a first, locked position locking the stationary blade to the bracket, and a second, unlocked position releasing the stationary blade from the bracket.
